title: Alto Partners: Consulting, the Alttene Way
excerpt: Our consulting firm exists for one kind of client: teams that want operators in the room, not observers. Here's how Alto Partners works.
content:
Most consulting engagements end with a beautiful deck and a polite goodbye. We started Alto Partners because we think they should end with something shipped.

Operators, not observers

Alto Partners is Alttene's consulting arm, and it has one structural advantage over a traditional firm: we run a product of our own. Every recommendation we make to a client is something we've had to live with ourselves on Koffeechat — the trade-offs, the migrations, the mornings after.

How we work

  1. Short, intense engagements. Weeks, not quarters. Long enough to change something, short enough to stay urgent.

  2. Three lanes. Strategy (positioning and prioritization), product (from discovery to shipped), and growth (acquisition, retention, and the analytics to tell them apart).

  3. Judged by what changes. Our measure of success is what your team does differently after we leave — not the page count of what we left behind.

Who it's for

Founders who need a senior thinking partner without a senior full-time hire. Established organizations entering new markets. Teams with momentum problems that look like strategy problems (and vice versa — it's usually vice versa).

If that's you, the first conversation is free and comes with coffee. Naturally.
author: Alttene Team
